authority_policy.principle: Owned sources are important course-design and retrieval surfaces, but they do not override external authority or reviewed machine registry truth.

source_surfaces.title: Course Blueprint v4
notes: Target exercises in the blueprint are strong owned curriculum-design evidence.
Blueprint prose is contextual and design-oriented; it is not sufficient by itself to mint or mutate machine units.
The blueprint currently covers only part of the intended multi-year course and must carry version/completion metadata in retrieval.
source_surfaces.projection_policy: May create owned-source projection edges in R9.2; blueprint prose is not a direct evidence edge.

source_surfaces.title: Course Blueprint v4 metadata
notes: Target exercises in the blueprint are strong owned curriculum-design evidence.
Blueprint prose is contextual and design-oriented; it is not sufficient by itself to mint or mutate machine units.
The blueprint currently covers only part of the intended multi-year course and must carry version/completion metadata in retrieval.
source_surfaces.projection_policy: Metadata informs authority and completion labels only.

source_surfaces.title: Course target exercises
source_surfaces.projection_policy: Target exercises may support unit-gap discovery; content graph links must be projection/evidence typed explicitly.
